name: Super B.E.S. Metal Slave
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> メタル・スレイブ
desc: You can send up to 5 Level 10 or lower "B.E.S." monsters with different names from your hand and/or Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, then place counters on this card equal to the number sent to the GY to activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Super B.E.S. Metal Slave" once per turn. Once per Chain (Quick Effect): You can remove 1 counter from this card, then target 2 face-up cards on the field, including 1 "B.E.S." monster you control; destroy them.
mnst_eff: You can send up to 5 Level 10 or lower "B.E.S." monsters with different names from your hand and/or Deck to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, then place counters on this card equal to the number sent to the GY to activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Super B.E.S. Metal Slave" once per turn. counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
